response.justification: The candidate is a strong, seasoned engineer with 15+ years of experience and staff-level roles at Stripe and Shopify, but his career centers on web and full-stack development in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. Professional C++ experience is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, and there is no evidence of MQTT, message brokers at industrial scale, IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle practice, or industrial automation domain exposure — the core pillars of this role. His low-latency DLang systems work is the closest adjacent skill, but it does not offset the missing C++ depth and industrial-security requirements for a senior manager expected to mentor others on those exact standards.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience with staff/senior roles at Stripe and Shopify
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Dunnhumby
Proven mentoring and knowledge-sharing record through workshops, courses, and open source
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, and it dates to 2014-2015
No industrial automation, MQTT/OPC UA, IEC 62443, or SDL exposure
Career trajectory is web/full-stack (TypeScript, Node.js), diverging from embedded/industrial systems

key_factors.factor: No industrial cybersecurity or IEC 62443 background
